old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-okcc","title":"Rust hetero_node packet_hash logging vs storage inconsistency","description":"In lichen-apps/src/bin/hetero_node.rs, metrics use 16-byte hash_prefix for HashSet (lines 146,177: hash[..16] as [u8;16]), but JSON 'packet_hash' and tx_id use hex string slice [..16] (8 bytes equiv, line 114). Inconsistent with Python's 32-char hex and the standardization goal. New bug from codereview pass after Python edit.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-22T14:46:28.192992677Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-22T14:46:28.192992677Z","labels":["codereview"]}

new_value: Aligned packet_hash to use consistent 16-char hex string in both HashSet storage and Telemetry JSON (shared from lichen-client::status). Updated inserts to match emit logic. Cargo check and test pass. Matched Python sim[:16] hex style. 3 codereview passes filed no P0-P2 findings.
